thought: This is a SymPy bug analysis question presented in ReAct format. I have enough understanding to diagnose the root cause: in non-simultaneous `subs`, `ConditionSet._eval_subs` incorrectly uses `new` (the substitution value `1/3`) as the bound variable of the resulting ConditionSet, instead of preserving `self.sym` (`x`). I can now provide the complete diagnosis and finish.
